label: Ashlock Storeroom
description: Ashlock Storeroom forms a narrow service chamber set behind a gasketed hatch within the Cinderwall Hab Suite, its walls faced in soot-stained plasteel and slagcrete to resist abrasion. Racked shelves and locking bins line the length of the space, their edges dulled by constant ashfilm and the grit carried in from Ashenward City’s windbreak corridors. A filtered intake grille and insulated conduit run along the ceiling, feeding the suite’s sealed systems while keeping the chamber under slight positive pressure. Low, violet-tinged lumen strips reflect off vitrified patches where heat and stormlight have glassed the surface.
